info.name: LeadFlow AI CRM — Complete API Collection v3
info.description: Auto-generated from actual source code (Zod schemas, Express routes, service files). Every field name, path, and response shape is verified against the codebase.

request.description: Checks API, database, and Redis health. No auth required.
Base API info endpoint.
Creates org + admin user. Fields: orgName, orgSlug, fullName, email, password. Response: data.organization, data.user, data.tokens.accessToken/refreshToken.
Authenticates user. Fields: organizationSlug, email, password. Response: data.user, data.tokens.accessToken/refreshToken.
Exchanges refreshToken for new token pair. Response: data.tokens.accessToken/refreshToken.
Returns authenticated user profile with permissions.
Blacklists current access token. Response: data.message.
Re-login to get fresh tokens after logout test.
Creates project with towers. Fields: projectCode, name, city, location?, projectType(enum), baseRate, reraNumber?, settings{}, towers[{name,floors,unitsPerFloor}].
Paginated list of projects.
Single project detail.
Updates project. All fields optional: name, city, location, baseRate, reraNumber, completionPct, settings.
Update project status. Enum: active, pre_launch, completed.
Lists towers for a project.
Adds towers to existing project. Fields: towers[{name, floors, unitsPerFloor}].
Unit statistics for a project (available/blocked/booked counts).

Creates sales person. Fields: spCode(uppercase), fullName, mobile(Indian), email?, team?, designation(enum: VP_Sales,Manager,Executive,Trainee, default:Executive), reportingTo?(uuid), monthlyTarget(default:0).
Lists all sales persons with pagination.
Single sales person detail.
Updates sales person. All fields optional: fullName, mobile, email, team, designation, reportingTo, monthlyTarget, isActive.
Sales team performance metrics.
Paginated unit list with optional filters: projectId, towerId, status, config, floor, search.
Single unit detail with cost sheet. Includes lazy expiry check.
Returns detailed cost breakdown for a unit.
Blocks a unit for a sales person. Fields: salesPersonId(uuid,required), agentId?(uuid), remarks?(max500).
Block second unit — same SP.
Block third unit — same SP (3-block limit).
BUSINESS RULE: 4th block by same SP must return 422. Max 3 active blocks per SP enforced via Redis atomic counter.
Releases a blocked unit back to available.
Releases a blocked unit back to available.
Records token payment. Fields: tokenAmount(positive), paymentMode(enum: cheque,neft,rtgs,upi,dd,cash), transactionRef?, remarks?.
Creates channel partner (agent). Fields: agentCode(uppercase), firmName?, contactPerson, mobile(Indian), email?, reraNumber(min5), pan?(ABCDE1234F), gstNumber?, commissionPct(0-10, default:2).
Rate an agent (1-5 stars).

Creates customer. Fields: fullName, fatherSpouse?, dateOfBirth?(ISO, refine: >=18yr), panNumber?(regex ABCDE1234F), aadhaarNumber?(12 digits), mobilePrimary(Indian), mobileAlternate?, email?, currentAddress?, occupation?, companyName?, annualIncome?, paymentMode?(self|loan|nri), preferredBank?, loanAmount?, coApplicantName?, coApplicantPan?, coApplicantRel?.
Second customer for transfer testing.

item.name: Create Customer Without Full KYC (no address/PAN)

request.description: BUSINESS RULE: Must be 18+. dateOfBirth refine rejects minors.

item.name: Create Customer with Duplicate PAN → isExisting:true

request.description: BUSINESS RULE: Duplicate PAN returns 200 with isExisting:true via find-or-create pattern (BKG-006). Response: data.isExisting=true.
Partial update. PAN and Aadhaar excluded from update schema.
Fields: kycVerified(bool,required), remarks?. Requires PAN on file.

Fields: fullName, mobile(Indian), email?, source(enum: whatsapp,website,referral,walk_in default:walk_in), interestedProject?(uuid), interestedConfig?(BHK_1..Penthouse), budgetMin?, budgetMax?, assignedTo?(uuid), remarks?.
Enum: new,contacted,site_visit_scheduled,site_visit_done,interested,negotiation,won,lost,junk. Optional: remarks, lostReason, convertedBookingId.

Fields: leadId(uuid), projectId(uuid), salesPersonId?(uuid), visitDate(datetime), visitType(enum: first_visit,revisit,family_visit,loan_agent_visit default:first_visit), visitorCount(1-20 default:1), remarks?.
Update fields: visitDate?, visitType?, visitorCount?, checkInAt?, checkOutAt?, feedback?(interested,thinking,not_interested,price_concern,location_concern), remarks?.
Fields: leadId(uuid), assignedTo?(uuid), taskType(enum: call,whatsapp,email,meeting,site_visit default:call), priority(high,medium,low default:medium), scheduledAt(datetime), remarks?.
Fields: taskType?, priority?, status?(pending,completed,missed,rescheduled), scheduledAt?, completedAt?, outcome?, remarks?.

Fields: unitId(uuid), customerId(uuid), salesPersonId(uuid), agentId?(uuid), tokenAmount(min0 default:0), discountAmount(min0 default:0), paymentMode(cheque,neft,rtgs,upi,dd,cash default:cheque), remarks?. Validates: unit blocked/token_received, KYC complete, no existing active booking. Response: data.booking.id/bookingCode/status, data.cascadeResults.
BUSINESS RULE: Customer missing required KYC fields (fullName,dateOfBirth,mobilePrimary,email,currentAddress,panNumber) → 422 with missing field list.
Returns booking with payments, commissions, demandLetters, paymentSchedules.
Registers booking with registrationDate and registrationNumber. Status must be booked or possession_handed.
BUSINESS RULE: Cannot re-register booking. Status is now 'registered' not in REGISTERABLE_STATUSES.

Fields: bookingId(uuid), customerId(uuid), unitId(uuid), demandLetterId?(uuid), amount(positive), paymentMode(cheque,neft,rtgs,upi,dd,cash), transactionRef?, paymentDate(datetime), remarks?, idempotencyKey?(uuid). BUSINESS RULE: NEFT/RTGS/UPI auto-clear; cheque/dd = under_process.

exec: function uuid() { return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function(c) { var r = Math.random()*16|0, v = c=='x' ? r : (r&0x3|0x8); return v.toString(16); }); }

request.description: BUSINESS RULE: Cheque payments start as under_process.
BUSINESS RULE: Same idempotencyKey → returns existing payment with isDuplicate:true.
Fields: status(cleared,bounced,under_process,refund_pending,refunded), bounceReason?, bounceDate?, remarks?. Bounce triggers cascade (auto-complaint).
Returns payment summary: finalValue, totalCollected, clearedAmount, pendingAmount, collectionPct.
Fields: bookingId(uuid), customerId(uuid), unitId(uuid), milestoneName(min2,max100), milestonePct(0-100), demandAmount(positive), dueDate(datetime).
Fields: reminderNote?(max500).
Returns presigned S3 upload URL + creates pending document record. Body: customerId, category, fileName, contentType. Response: data.documentId, data.uploadUrl, data.fileKey.
Marks pending document as 'uploaded' after S3 PUT completes.
Returns presigned S3 download URL. Only works for 'uploaded' or 'verified' documents.

Direct document registration. Fields: customerId(uuid), bookingId?(uuid), category(enum: pan_card,aadhaar,photo,address_proof,income_proof,bank_statement,agreement,registration,noc,allotment_letter,possession_letter,other), fileName, fileKey, fileSize(max 10MB), mimeType?, remarks?.
NOC document needed for transfer test.
Fields: status(enum: verified,rejected), remarks?.
BUSINESS RULE: Download only works for uploaded/verified docs. Non-existent or pending → 404.

Fields: customerId(uuid), unitId?(uuid), bookingId?(uuid), category(payment,construction,documentation,general default:general), subject(min5,max200), description(min10,max2000), priority(high,medium,low default:medium).

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": "{{customerId}}",
  "unitId": "{{unitId}}",
  "bookingId": "{{bookingId}}",
  "category": "construction",
  "subject": "Water leakage in master bedroom",
  "description": "Water seepage observed on the ceiling of master bedroom near AC duct area. Issue started after recent heavy rains.",
  "priority": "high"
}

request.description: Fields: assignedTo?(uuid), priority?(high,medium,low), remarks?.
Fields: resolution(min10,max2000), remarks?.
Fields: remarks(min5,max500).

Fields: customerId?(uuid), leadId?(uuid) — at least one required (refine). channel(call,email,whatsapp,sms,in_person default:call), direction(inbound,outbound default:outbound), subject?, content?, durationSeconds?.

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": "{{customerId}}",
  "channel": "call",
  "direction": "outbound",
  "subject": "Payment reminder",
  "content": "Reminded customer about upcoming demand letter due date of April 15. Customer confirmed payment by April 10.",
  "durationSeconds": 180
}

{
  "leadId": "{{leadId}}",
  "channel": "whatsapp",
  "direction": "outbound",
  "subject": "Brochure shared",
  "content": "Shared project brochure and floor plans via WhatsApp"
}

request.description: Fields: requestType(cancellation,transfer,discount,refund,possession,other), entityType(min2,max100), entityId(uuid), justification(min10,max1000), requestData?(record).
Returns pending approval counts by type for dashboard badges.
BUSINESS RULE: Cannot review your own approval request. Requestor == reviewer → 422.
Fields: status(approved,rejected), reviewRemarks(min5,max500). NOTE: This will succeed only if reviewer != requestor. May need a different user.

Fields: bookingId(uuid), customerId(uuid), unitId(uuid), bankName(min2,max100), branchName?, loanAccountNumber?, sanctionedAmount(positive), interestRate(0-30), tenureMonths(12-360), emiAmount?, loanOfficer?, loanOfficerMobile?(Indian), remarks?.

body.raw:
{
  "bookingId": "{{bookingId}}",
  "customerId": "{{customerId}}",
  "unitId": "{{unitId}}",
  "bankName": "State Bank of India",
  "branchName": "Pune Kothrud Branch",
  "loanAccountNumber": "SBI-HL-2026-001234",
  "sanctionedAmount": 5000000,
  "interestRate": 8.5,
  "tenureMonths": 240,
  "emiAmount": 43391,
  "loanOfficer": "Rahul Deshpande",
  "loanOfficerMobile": "9876012345",
  "remarks": "Home loan sanctioned"
}

request.description: Fields: bankName?, branchName?, loanAccountNumber?, loanOfficer?, loanOfficerMobile?, remarks?.
Fields: amount(positive), disbursementDate(datetime), transactionRef?, remarks?.
Fields: status(applied,sanctioned,disbursed,rejected,closed), remarks?.
BUSINESS RULE: nocDocumentId is REQUIRED in initiateTransferSchema (not optional). Missing it → Zod validation 400.
Fields: bookingId(uuid), unitId(uuid), toCustomerId(uuid), transferFee?(min0), nocDocumentId(uuid,required), remarks?.
Fields: approvedBy(uuid), remarks?.
Preview cancellation impact before initiating.
Fields: bookingId(uuid), reason(min10,max1000), requestedBy?(uuid).
Fields: forfeiturePct(0-100), adminFee(min0 default:5000), brokerageRecovery(min0 default:0), approvedBy(uuid), remarks?.
Lists all possession records. Auto-created by booking cascade.
Fields: possessionDate?, handoverBy?(uuid), remarks?, checklist?{possession_letter,keys_handed,meter_readings,welcome_kit,noc_obtained}.
Fields: possessionId(uuid), unitId(uuid), description(min5,max500), category(plumbing,electrical,civil,painting default:civil), priority(high,medium,low default:medium), reportedDate(datetime).

body.raw:
{
  "possessionId": "{{possessionId}}",
  "unitId": "{{unitId}}",
  "description": "Minor crack visible near kitchen window frame",
  "category": "civil",
  "priority": "low",
  "reportedDate": "2026-06-16T09:00:00.000Z"
}

request.description: Fields: status?(open,in_progress,resolved), priority?(high,medium,low), resolvedDate?, resolvedBy?(uuid), remarks?.
Fields: possessionDate(datetime,required), handoverBy(uuid,required), remarks?.
Returns KPIs: inventory, bookings, revenue, leads, complaints. Response shape: { success, data, cached }. First call: cached=false (fresh data).
BUSINESS RULE: Second call within 5 min → cached:true from Redis.

exec: // cached:true only if Redis is available; false is acceptable when limit exceeded

request.description: Sales performance: byProject, monthlyTrend, byConfig.
Collection metrics: totalCollected, byMode, overdue demand letters.
Paginated audit logs. Query: page, pageSize.
Returns audit trail for a specific entity (entityType/entityId).
Returns activity log for a specific user.
SECURITY: Request without Authorization header must return 401.
SECURITY: Invalid JWT token must return 401.
404 handler: unmatched routes return AppError with ROUTE_NOT_FOUND.
Malformed JSON body should return 400.
Missing required fields should return 400 with VALIDATION_ERROR and field details.
Prisma parameterized queries prevent SQL injection.
XSS payloads in input fields should be handled safely.
Auth endpoints have stricter rate limiting. Rapid requests may get 429.
Attempting to register with existing slug returns 409 ConflictError.
Password regex requires uppercase letter and number.
Requesting a non-existent UUID returns 404 NotFoundError.
Fields: commissionId(uuid), amountPaid(positive), paymentMode(cheque,neft,rtgs,upi,dd,cash), transactionRef?, remarks?.
